item.title: Israeli strikes kill at least 10 in Lebanon, officials say
item.description: The strikes are among the deadliest in Lebanon since a ceasefire ended the war between Israel and Hezbollah.

item.title: Italian toddler dies after transplant with heart 'burned by frostbite'
item.description: The heart given to two-year-old Domenico was reportedly severely damaged during its transfer to hospital.

item.title: Avalanches kill five in Austrian Alps, officials say
item.description: A man skiing with his son was among the victims on Friday, bringing the region's avalanche death toll this season to at least 21.

item.title: Tumbler Ridge suspect's ChatGPT account banned before shooting
item.description: OpenAI said the account's activity did not meet the threshold to flag it to authorities when it was identified.

item.title: Palestinian Authority in dire straits as Israel's hold on West Bank deepens
item.description: More than 30 years after its creation, there are increasing warnings that the PA is close to collapse.
